programme.title: Госпожа Фазилет и ее дочери
programme.desc: Госпожа Фазилет после того, как потеряла мужа, одна воспитывает двух дочек. Вся жизнь Фазилет прошла в сожалениях, поэтому теперь ее вкладом в будущее стала младшая дочь Эдже. Но самым большим препятствием на пути матери является старшая дочь Хазан, которая несмотря на свою изысканную красоту ведет себя по-мальчишески и не ладит с матерью. Семья Эймен богата, могущественна, у них особняк на берегу Босфора, и однажды их пути пересекаются с Фазилет и ее дочерьми. Богатство Эймен даже превосходит мечты Фазилет. После знакомства с ними изменится не только жизнь Эдже, но и Хазан, которая влюбится в Синана Эймена, избалованного сына семьи.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: 6 сезон шоу \"Экстрасенсы ведут расследование\", в котором люди со сверхспособностями помогают полиции и частным детективам найти ответы на сложные вопросы, раскрыть настоящие преступления и докопаться до истины.

programme.title: Балтия
programme.desc: Еженедельная информационная программа "Балтия" – непредвзятый взгляд на происходящее в Эстонии, Латвии и Литве. События, явления и люди в репортажах корреспондентов Настоящего Времени, работающих в регионе. Точная и беспристрастная информация, все точки зрения о происходящем в каждой из трех стран, входящих в Евросоюз и военный блок НАТО.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Конец славы
programme.desc: Востребованный и избалованный актер Слава в один момент теряет все — контракты, популярность, хорошие отношения с семьей. Однако главный герой не сдается и вместе со своим агентом придумывает опасную авантюру — похоронить себя заживо, чтобы воскресить карьеру и начать с чистого листа.

programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Голое влечение
programme.desc: Скандальный цикл передач, в которых люди находят потенциальных спутников жизни, обнаженные тела которых им показывают. Затем они должны будут сами раздеться и сделать выбор.

programme.title: Мамаша
programme.desc: Рассказ о жизни Кристи Планкетт, одинокой матери, которая преодолела свою зависимость от алкоголя и наркотиков и пытается начать жизнь заново в городе Напа, Калифорния, который является центром американского виноделия. Она работает официанткой в ресторане и посещает встречи анонимных алкоголиков. Её мать Бонни Планкетт, также как и дочь, справилась с зависимостью от алкоголя и наркотиков и хочет наладить отношения с дочерью. Семнадцатилетняя дочь Вайолет, родившаяся, когда Кристи было всего 16 лет, ждет ребёнка от своего приятеля Люка. У Кристи также есть второй ребёнок - Роско, от бывшего парня по имени Бакстер. У Бакстера нет работы, он не платит алименты Кристи, а его планы о заработке денег связаны с продажей наркотиков.

programme.title: Мамаша
programme.desc: Рассказ о жизни Кристи Планкетт, одинокой матери, которая преодолела свою зависимость от алкоголя и наркотиков и пытается начать жизнь заново в городе Напа, Калифорния, который является центром американского виноделия. Она работает официанткой в ресторане и посещает встречи анонимных алкоголиков. Её мать Бонни Планкетт, также как и дочь, справилась с зависимостью от алкоголя и наркотиков и хочет наладить отношения с дочерью. Семнадцатилетняя дочь Вайолет, родившаяся, когда Кристи было всего 16 лет, ждет ребёнка от своего приятеля Люка. У Кристи также есть второй ребёнок - Роско, от бывшего парня по имени Бакстер. У Бакстера нет работы, он не платит алименты Кристи, а его планы о заработке денег связаны с продажей наркотиков.

programme.title: Переживу
programme.desc: Документальный проект Бориса Барабанова о российских артистах, вынужденных покинуть родину из-за политических преследований и стойких антивоенных убеждений. Эти люди уже добились признания у себя на родине, однако они сделали смелый выбор и начали новую жизнь после полномасштабного вторжения России в Украину. Каждый из них продолжает борьбу с режимом из зарубежных городов.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Как в Калифорнии очищают воду от CO2. В Пенсильвании придумали, как управлять роботами при помощи прикосновений. Новое воздушное такси: оно может заработать уже на Олимпиаде в Париже в 2024 году. Что думают ученые о борьбе со старением.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Ученые обнаруживают в воздухе вирусы в режиме реального времени. Человекоподобные роботы будут массово производиться уже в этом году. Как наука объясняет некоторые мистические явления у людей? В Калифорнии укрепляют здания из-за угрозы землетрясений.

programme.title: Детали
programme.desc: Во Флориде обнаружили кораллы, устойчивые к изменению окружающей среды. Как дневной сон влияет на когнитивные способности человека. Ученые смогли обезвредить раковые клетки, удалив в них лишние хромосомы. Как еда связана со скоростью старения организма.

programme.title: Время надежды
programme.desc: Надежда мечтает о большой любви и светлом будущем. По ней с детства сохнет скоромный отличник Егор. Однако в тот момент, когда он набрался решимости сделать девушке предложение, она влюбляется в его друга, самоуверенного ловеласа Ивана. Вскоре Надя выходит за него замуж и молодые переезжают в квартиру к свекрови. Мать Ивана не одобряет его выбор, но готова терпеть невестку ради новорожденного внука Ванечки. Счастливая жизнь девушки рушится в одночасье, когда муж неожиданно погибает, а сын исчезает. И теперь его поиски становятся для Надежды единственным смыслом жизни.

programme.title: Время надежды
programme.desc: Надежда мечтает о большой любви и светлом будущем. По ней с детства сохнет скоромный отличник Егор. Однако в тот момент, когда он набрался решимости сделать девушке предложение, она влюбляется в его друга, самоуверенного ловеласа Ивана. Вскоре Надя выходит за него замуж и молодые переезжают в квартиру к свекрови. Мать Ивана не одобряет его выбор, но готова терпеть невестку ради новорожденного внука Ванечки. Счастливая жизнь девушки рушится в одночасье, когда муж неожиданно погибает, а сын исчезает. И теперь его поиски становятся для Надежды единственным смыслом жизни.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины
programme.desc: В часть МЧС, которой руководит майор Гиреев, приезжает с инспекцией подполковник Белов — бывший муж Тани. Он \"копает\" под Гиреева и Грека, пытаясь обвинить их в гибели спасателя. В больнице срочно требуется операция ребенку с редкой группой крови. Из Москвы отправляют контейнер с кровью для переливания, но медики \"скорой\" попадают в аварию — контейнер улетает в горную реку. К его поискам подключаются спасатели. Грек проявляет героизм и едва не погибает сам. Таня переживает за него, не скрывая своих чувств.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины
programme.desc: Выпускник Академии МЧС Александр Грек рассчитывал пройти стажировку в штабе. Но неожиданно его отправляют в Карелию в горноспасательный отряд под руководством опытного и жесткого командира Гиреева. Команда Гиреева известна среди коллег не только своим профессионализмом, но и умением найти в каждой операции по спасению нестандартный выход из ситуации, порой граничащий с безумием. Новые товарищи — спасатель Коля Петров, кинолог по прозвищу Старик, врач Таня — все время подшучивают над Александром. Молодой человек тем временем надеется на содействие своего влиятельного дяди, который может устроить ему перевод в столицу. А пока он вместе с командой отправляется на первое задание, и оно оборачивается катастрофой…

programme.title: Балтия
programme.desc: Еженедельная информационная программа "Балтия" – непредвзятый взгляд на происходящее в Эстонии, Латвии и Литве. События, явления и люди в репортажах корреспондентов Настоящего Времени, работающих в регионе. Точная и беспристрастная информация, все точки зрения о происходящем в каждой из трех стран, входящих в Евросоюз и военный блок НАТО.

programme.title: Что же получается
programme.desc: Власти Вены помогают горожанам снять или купить квартиру в 2-3 раза дешевле рыночной цены. Главное условие - не зарабатывать чистыми больше 4100 евро в месяц на человека. Программа доступного жилья в столице Австрии работает уже более 100 лет - ею пользуется более 60% населения двухмиллионного города. Съемочная группа проекта "Что же получается" отправилась в Вену, чтобы рассказать вам подробности и показать, как выглядит местное социальное жилье.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: Татьяна - обычная, милая девушка - хорошая мать, любящая жена, заботливая дочь. Но это только на первый взгляд, стоит вам с ней поссориться, как в жизни начнут происходить самые неприятные вещи. И это касается абсолютно всех. Медиум Александр Шепс и сибирская ведьма Елена Голунова попробуют разобраться в происходящем.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: Обычно эти люди не любят камер и публичности, но для шоу "Экстрасенсы ведут расследование" даже принципиальные затворники готовы сделать исключение, ведь речь идет о реальной помощи.

programme.title: Экстрасенсы ведут расследование
programme.desc: 6 сезон шоу \"Экстрасенсы ведут расследование\", в котором люди со сверхспособностями помогают полиции и частным детективам найти ответы на сложные вопросы, раскрыть настоящие преступления и докопаться до истины.

programme.title: Д'Артаньян и три мушкетера
programme.desc: Фильм, ставший классикой советского исторического кино. Песни из него до сих пор популярны и не одно поколение выросло, подражая героям. В основу сценария положена книга А. Дюма. Странствующий храбрец из провинции по имени д'Артаньян встречает трёх мушкетеров, между ними происходит стычка, выливающаяся во взаимное уважение, а позже - крепкую дружбу. Вчетвером они стоят на страже интересов короля и королевы Франции, сражаются с гвардейцами коварного кардинала Ришелье, стараясь не попадать в ловушки, расставленные коварной Миледи.

programme.title: Дикая Лига
programme.desc: Начало XX века. Чтобы быть с любимой, парню Варламу из низших социальных слоев пришлось покинуть родные края и начать жить в Москве. Проявившего себя в бою стенка на стенку парня замечает англичанин, владелец футбольного клуба, который предлагает ему попробовать силы в команде. Однако команда не принимает неотесанного бурлака с Волги. Тогда собравшись с силами, Варлам вместе с настоящим патриотом и увлеченным футболом купцом Балашовым создает первую народную команду и становится лидером, меняя свою жизнь и жизнь окружающих. Благодаря Варламу и его команде футбол в России становится поистине народной игрой.

programme.title: Майор
programme.desc: Спеша в роддом к жене, майор полиции Соболев не справляется с управлением на скользкой дороге и сбивает на глазах у матери семилетнего мальчика. Он понимает свою вину, но соблазн оправдяться берет вверх и майор использует служебное положение и профессиональные связи, чтобы разрешить неприятную ситуацию. Запускаются страшные механизмы – начинают гибнуть люди, казалось бы, не имеющие к трагедии непосредственного отношения. В конце концов запутавшийся Соболев вынужден пойти против системы.

programme.title: Эльбрус. Точка невозврата
programme.desc: Ровно год назад группа туристов в сопровождении гидов отправилась покорять самую высокую гору России. Но все пошло не по плану, когда мощный шторм превратил Эльбрус в ледяную ловушку... После отчаянной многочасовой борьбы за жизнь, многих удалось спасти, но для пятерых участников группы этот поход стал последним. Как и почему случилась трагедия? Есть ли предел человеческих возможностей? Нужна ли подготовка для восхождения на гору? Есть ли герои среди нас? Какова судьба и роль гидов в этой истории? Это рассказ с разных точек зрения о том, как желание выжить любой ценой сталкивается с равнодушной стихией, звучит из первых уст - от участников похода.

programme.title: Ловушка
programme.desc: Главе самого мощного городского мафиозного клана удалось прекратить криминальные войны. Казалось бы, он наконец-то может уйти на покой, передав дела своим молодым и дерзким помощникам. Но те слишком рьяно берутся за дело: быстро удваивают доходы, но своими жесткими методами вызывают волну всеобщего недовольства. Мечта крестного отца о тихой жизни никак не осуществится - ему постоянно приходится вмешиваться, чтобы сохранить мир. Однако о мире приходится забыть, когда после 12-ти лет тюрьмы в город возвращается крупный криминальный авторитет, готовый любой ценой вернуть утраченные позиции.

programme.title: Ловушка
programme.desc: Главе самого мощного городского мафиозного клана удалось прекратить криминальные войны. Казалось бы, он наконец-то может уйти на покой, передав дела своим молодым и дерзким помощникам. Но те слишком рьяно берутся за дело: быстро удваивают доходы, но своими жесткими методами вызывают волну всеобщего недовольства. Однако о мире приходится забыть, когда после 12-ти лет тюрьмы в город возвращается крупный криминальный авторитет, готовый любой ценой вернуть утраченные позиции.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: Hosted by Erin Burnett, an expert in political science and economics, OutFront is an hour-long news programme examining the latest stories from the US and further afield. Broadcast live from either the New York studio or live on location from the site of a breaking story, the show features insightful opinions from informed guests. With expert analysis from CNN's correspondents and analysis from the show's panel, Erin Burnett OutFront dissects the stories of the day, leaving no stone unturned. Burnett, a former financial analyst for Goldman Sachs, uses her forthright approach to engage interviewees in honest discussion.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper delves into the day's news, looking beyond the broadcast to give his take, prompting us to re-think what we hear in the headlines. Cooper has covered major, international stories like the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina on the Gulf Coast, the catastrophic BP oil spill and the 2010 earthquake in Haiti, which saw the whole world fall silent. The show has won an absolute plethora of awards over the years, including GLAAD Media and Emmy awards.

programme.desc: Current affairs show with Abby Phillip.

programme.title: Laura Coates Live
programme.desc: Current affairs show.

programme.desc: A live showcase of the biggest breaking news stories in the U.S. and around the world. Fresh, surprising perspectives on the stories everyone is talking about, including moments of joy, hope and humor.

programme.desc: One of the CNN's longest running programmes that allows viewers to find out all the global sports news, see all the important events and most interesting parts, and enjoy the interviews with sports pundits and various sports stars.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom
programme.desc: CNN Newroom provides the most up to date news as it breaks and is the longest running show on the channel, airing twice a day Monday to Friday and throughout the day over the weekends. CNN has developed a lot since its founding in 1980 by American media proprietor Ted Turner as a 24 hour cable news channel. As an organisation, CNN have won multiple awards, including a network-record six news & documentary Emmy Awards in 2018.

programme.title: Early Start
programme.desc: Start your day with all the information you need. This hour gives you the stories that will shape the next 24. On the agenda: U.S. politics and global affairs, what to expect in the business world, and key cultural and sporting events.

programme.title: CNN This Morning
programme.desc: The latest news and information from around the world. Don Lemon, Poppy Harlow, and Kaitlan Collins host.

programme.desc: News. The core hub of the network's best newsgathering operation during the day, bringing stories to viewers in real time, while offering perspective and context to key issues using innovative technology and storytelling tools.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Join high profile news anchor Becky Anderson live from Abu Dhabi as she brings you all the latest news from around the world . This is CNN's international flagship current affairs prime time news program. CNN is one of America's biggest news broadcasters, truth seekers and story tellers. Reaching nearly every corner of the world, with a dedicated and experienced team of journalists, designers and technologists, CNN bears witness to history as it unfolds.

programme.title: Isa Soares Tonight
programme.desc: Isa Soares brings together CNN's world-class journalists with top newsmakers and experts to help viewers navigate the complex events shaping our present and our future.

programme.title: What We Know with Max Foster
programme.desc: Max Foster has a definitive roundup of the day's top stories, giving you the urgent need-to-know context, plus a deeper dive into the questions sparking debate around the world.

programme.title: Quest Means Business
programme.desc: He's not messing around: Richard Quest presents his hot takes on the biggest breaking stories in the world of business. Watch for the expert analysis, commentary and opinions on the important headlines in the field from the notorious English journalist and CNN anchor. Joined by a cast of experts and correspondents delivering unrivaled facts and news, but also features and fascinating takes, figures and analysis on everything going down in the world of business.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: News, politics and current affairs programme hosted by the award-winning, American journalist and author, Jake Tapper. Jake Tapper is the chief Washington correspondent for CNN and he will share his knowledge and insight into politics as well as covering a variety of other topics. This programme discusses a range of stories from topical events including national news, economics/finance, sports, health, technology and world affairs. The Lead with Jake Tapper has won a number of awards and accolades including three National Headliner Awards. Outside his work on television, Tapper has written for The New Yorker, The Washington Post and the Los Angeles Times as well as publishing his first novel, a political thriller.

programme.desc: One of the CNN's longest running programmes that allows viewers to find out all the global sports news, see all the important events and most interesting parts, and enjoy the interviews with sports pundits and various sports stars.

programme.title: The Brief with Jim Sciutto
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: Quest's World of Wonder
programme.desc: Join our host, Richard Quest, as he takes us on a journey of discovery to some of the most iconic cities on the planet. Richard encounters many of the influential local inhabitants and delves into the heritage and culture of each city to reveal what makes them unique and fascinating. The first series sees Richard travel around the globe to visit Washington D.C. and explore the awesome power that resides in the city; in Panama City, Richard searchess for some of the legendary figures who shaped its identity; the vibrancy of Nairobi excites the imagination while Athens treis to sustain its legacy in the modern world; multi-cultural London reveals its elegant and martial history and the people of Berlin enahnce its attractions; and the exotic and singular atmosphere of Istanbul delights the senses.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom
programme.desc: CNN Newroom provides the most up to date news as it breaks and is the longest running show on the channel, airing twice a day Monday to Friday and throughout the day over the weekends. CNN has developed a lot since its founding in 1980 by American media proprietor Ted Turner as a 24 hour cable news channel. As an organisation, CNN have won multiple awards, including a network-record six news & documentary Emmy Awards in 2018.

programme.title: African Voices
programme.desc: Baillor Jalloh, Nkululeko Sibanda and guests, African perspectives on topical issues

programme.title: Connecting Africa
programme.desc: The African continent is going through a big transformation and this CNN magazine presents the entrepreneurs, companies and projects that are working hard to modernise it and make its economic integration possible. Hosted by Eleni Giokos, the episodes bring stories about the fast growing industry, network communication, cross-border trade and increasing trading routes, air connectivity, logistics infrastructure, small businesses and more.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: Each week, Inside Africa documentary series on CNN highlights the unique diversity of mysterious Africa, its numerous cultures and religions, peoples, art, music, cuisine, travel and literature, its one-of-a-kind flora and fauna. Watch the interviews with people from various spheres of life and find out more surprising facts about this continent: how it fights for conservation of rare animals, who the new figures in fashion and design are, what the new educational programs for children look like. Everything what Africa is filled with and lives for is in this series.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: One of the CNN's longest running programmes that allows viewers to find out all the global sports news, see all the important events and most interesting parts, and enjoy the interviews with sports pundits and various sports stars.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons complain about their day and order a pizza from Larry... / The citizens of Elmore are feeling down because it's January, so Gumball and Anais invent a new holiday called Sluzzle Tag. / In Biology class, Gumball and Darwin are waiting for a butterfly to emerge from its chrysalis. / After Gumball and Darwin have too much sugary cereal they begin thinking about the mysteries of the universe. / Gumball, Darwin and Anais discover that Banana Joe's mom paints pictures which predict the future. / When Mr Small shows a health and safety video in class, Darwin becomes obsessed with the idea of keeping the Wattersons safe. / Anais throws a party but no-one shows up as she has no friends or social skills. / Alan is so good-natured that Gumball feels compelled to make him lose his temper. / Things aren't going Gumball's way at school so he assumes there must be a Secret Society...

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Amazing World of Gumball revolves around the life of Gumball Watterson, a 12-year-old cat who attends middle school in the fictional city of Elmore. Accompanied by his adoptive goldfish brother and best friend Darwin, he frequently finds himself involved in various shenanigans around the city, during which he interacts with his other family members - sister Anais and parents Nicole and Richard - and an extended supporting cast of characters. With relatable themes and a unique cast of characters, The Amazing World of Gumball exemplifies the funny, amazing, sweet and optimistic side of kids' everyday life. Injected with a good deal of humor and unpredictable nonsense, Gumball's world reflects the modern family and everyday issues that kids understand.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Each member of the family thinks their demographic has it the toughest. Gumball and Darwin think guys have it the worst. Mom thinks women do. Anais thinks kids do. And Dad thinks that grown-ups do. They decide the only way to figure it out is to spend a day in each other's shoes, no matter if they're too-small, too-big, or high-heeled.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Anais has made a new friend, so Gumball and Darwin immediately assume there must be something wrong with him. / Gumball and Darwin think it's one of those days when nothing interesting is happening. programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: When Anais enlists her dad's help with her science project, Richard's GUT becomes its own brilliant thinking entity, separate from the original Richard we all know, and Anais must choose between the two.

At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig and his two best friends, Kelsey and JP, are always going on adventures in the untamed suburban wilderness known as the Creek - a kid utopia where tribes of children rule over tree forts and bike ramps, making up an entire kid society. Each episode finds the kids either venturing into unexplored areas of the Creek, encountering new Creek Kids, or just getting into trouble at their hang out - the Stump.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig and his cousin, Bryson, join forces for an action packed weekend at their grandparents house. / Kelsey and Stacks write a story for book club, which turns out to be more personal than Kelsey realized. / Friends and rivals are pitted against each other in a dangerous game of dodgeball. / When the library is thrown into disarray, an ancient ghost is awoken.

programme.title: Lana Longbeard
programme.desc: Lana is a super-feisty, forward-thinking and passionate 11-year-old girl, who is also the heir to her father's adventuring ship, the Mighty Windbreaker. Along with her captain dad and his diverse crew (an orc, a dwarf, a barbarian and a cyclops), she sails across the Ten Realms, dreaming of becoming one of the greatest adventurers of all time. But first, she must overcome some challenging obstacles: impulsivity, stubbornness, extreme curiosity, disdain for rules … and a love of pancakes. All the best things about her!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Craig builds a "snowme" and convinces Kelsey and JP to do the same - this results in some interesting new houses as Bobby joins in the fun, but they soon decide that they need to get jobs to maintain their new 'lifestyles'. Feeling that they are overworked, they decide to fight back against their "boss" - an inflatable clown - but then into more trouble...

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Craig is on his own when he discovers an abandoned playhouse in the middle of a frozen lake and ends up running into his rival Wildernessa - the pair end up bickering and arguing over their differing views when they are left stranded after the lake ice breaks, but a huddle in the playhouse to escape the cold proves to be highly beneficial for the duo.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. Elder Con comes to the Creek and the Stump Kids are excited - Craig befriends a fellow fan but ends up in a trivia battle with her over a cup, Kelsey sets up a booth and tries to sell her book but has trouble getting any customers, and JP tries to get into a screening room but encounters obstacles - when he finally enters, he discovers something unusual...

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family. / Anais arrives in the bedroom to find a messy crime-scene and her Daisy doll missing. She realises Gumball and Darwin are the chief suspects. / A mysterious figure from Nicole's past shows up and challenges her to a fight, but the kids are surprised when she refuses. / A compilation of some of the funniest, most bizarre clips uploaded onto the internet by the people of Elmore. / When Rob purchases a universal remote from the Awesome Store he discovers he can control the universe. He rewinds into the past and remembers Gumball had left him in The Void. / When we last saw Gumball he was hitting rewind on Rob's Universal Remote just in time to save himself from being trapped in The Void. / Gumball and Darwin go to extreme lengths to help Molly make her dull stories more interesting. / Anais has made a new friend, so Gumball and Darwin immediately assume there must be something wrong with him. / Gumball and Darwin think it's one of those days when nothing interesting is happening. But as they walk around Elmore it appears exciting things are happening just not to them. 1

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: When Anais enlists her dad's help with her science project, Richard's GUT becomes its own brilliant thinking entity, separate from the original Richard we all know, and Anais must choose between the two.

programme.title: Goat Girl
programme.desc: Gigi, raised by mountain goats, attends boarding school at 13. Having had minimal human contact, this marks her first real exposure to society, prompting overseers Nanny and Billy to push her to spread her wings among people versus goats.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Anais rescue her doll from Tina Rex. / Gumball and Darwin are unwitting accomplices in a gas station robbery. / Gumball and Darwin accidentally destroy Mr Robinson's new car… or do they? / Gumball experiences an impossibly unfortunate chain of events. / Gumball and Darwin accidentally create a loveable monster that eats their family. / Gumball is embarrassed when Mum comes to school to spend some "quality time". / Gumball's magic tinfoil helmet threatens to tear the Watterson family apart! / Anais is convinced that Gumball is being bullied by Tina Rex.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Colossus: Gumball and Darwin learn that it isn't wise to upset Hector Elmore's resident Giant. / The Knights: Gumball and Tobias compete for Penny's affection by putting on the lamest duel in history. / The Remote: The Wattersons' battle for possession of the TV remote gets dirty. / The Fridge: When Mom discovers Gumball has no ambition she is determined to turn him into a winner. / Gumball seeks justice when Banana Joe chews Darwin's pen. / Gumball is determined to drive Penny away from Leslie / Darwin develops a texting addiction when he and Gumball get their first cell phone. / Richard gets a job as a pizza delivery man which worries Nicole when at the same time strange things begin to occur around the neighbourhood. / Gumball Darwin and Anais search for the Watterson family treasure.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: When Anais enlists her dad's help with her science project, Richard's GUT becomes its own brilliant thinking entity, separate from the original Richard we all know, and Anais must choose between the two.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!

With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai the blue jay and Rigby the raccoon hate having to do work as groundskeepers at the local park, trying to slack off whenever they can. When they have simple problems to solve, they often lead to a surreal, extreme, and often supernatural misadventures. Usually this makes their boss, Benson (a gumball machine) extremely angry and on the verge to fire them and annoys their coworker, Skips (a yeti, voiced by Mark Hamill). The pair are always saved by the other manager/owner Pops (a man with a lollipop-shaped head) as he enjoys their constant antics. Co-workers Muscle-Man (an overweight, green man) and Hi-Five Ghost sometimes get involved in the shenanigans, but usually find a way out and leave Mordecai and Rigby in the firing line.

Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Amazing World of Gumball revolves around the life of Gumball Watterson a 12-year-old cat who attends middle school in the fictional city of Elmore. Accompanied by his adoptive goldfish brother and best friend Darwin he frequently finds himself involved in various shenanigans around the city during which he interacts with his other family members - sister Anais and parents Nicole and Richard - and an extended supporting cast of characters. With relatable themes and a unique cast of characters The Amazing World of Gumball exemplifies the funny amazing sweet and optimistic side of kids' everyday life. Injected with a good deal of humor and unpredictable nonsense Gumball's world reflects the modern family and everyday issues that kids understand.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: When Darwin asks Gumball to teach him how to skate Gumball makes sure that he covers every aspect of the skating lifestyle - from wearing the right gear using the right terms and choosing the right board. But when Darwin finally gets his wheels rolling he realises there might be one important aspect of skating that Gumball hasn't taught him...

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons discover a family of cartoon copycats who mimic their every move. / Grandpa Louie has a new online friend - the only problem is she isn't real. / The kids find out that Richard has been being picked on by the same person since high school. / Gumball and Darwin decide to use online reviews to wrangle free stuff. / A mysterious package shows up at the Watterson's house and they do their best to avoid opening it. / Darwin likes a girl in his class so Gumball decides it's time to play cupid. / Gumball's smart answers aren't the correct ones and he's forced to go back to kindergarten. / Gumball and Darwin discover the real reason Dad's diet wasn't working. / Gumball discovers that Rob his old nemesis is neme-seeing someone else now.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: Penny wants to ask Gumball to the Elmore Jr High Prom, but when Gumball's expectations for an extra romantic and extra complicated gesture become way more than Penny can handle, Penny must find a way to deliver.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig and his two best friends, Kelsey and JP, are always going on adventures in the untamed suburban wilderness known as the Creek - a kid utopia where tribes of children rule over tree forts and bike ramps, making up an entire kid society. Each episode finds the kids either venturing into unexplored areas of the Creek, encountering new Creek Kids, or just getting into trouble at their hang out - the Stump.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: The Stump Kids seek Kenneth's help but find an annoyed Xavier instead - they visit the Elders who were once friends with Kenneth and David calls him, but Mark gets into an argument over how much he has changed. When David and Barry leave and the kids have no answer, they watch Kenneth's anime, realise that the Heart of the Forest is from the show, and vow to find it... but all while unaware that Xavier is spying on them with his drones.

programme.title: Lana Longbeard
programme.desc: Lana is a super-feisty, forward-thinking and passionate 11-year-old girl, who is also the heir to her father's adventuring ship, the Mighty Windbreaker. Along with her captain dad and his diverse crew (an orc, a dwarf, a barbarian and a cyclops), she sails across the Ten Realms, dreaming of becoming one of the greatest adventurers of all time. But first, she must overcome some challenging obstacles: impulsivity, stubbornness, extreme curiosity, disdain for rules … and a love of pancakes. All the best things about her!

programme.desc: The Wattersons run over Santa Claus and must save Christmas. / Gumball and Darwin receive an heirloom from Richard but lose it. / Bobert loses a bet to Gumball so has to obey him for 24 hours. / Gumball asks Idaho to teach his family to live a simpler life. / Gumball teaches Darwin a lesson after Darwin leaves him. / Granny JoJo's overprotective behavior puts the Wattersons in danger. / Gumball thinks Teri is way too scared of germs. / Gumball and Darwin rent a film called A Pony's Tail to watch with Anais but keep getting distracted on their way home. / Gumball destroys Alan and Carmen's relationship and has to reunite them.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai the blue jay and Rigby the raccoon hate having to do work as groundskeepers at the local park, trying to slack off whenever they can. When they have simple problems to solve, they often lead to a surreal, extreme, and often supernatural misadventures. Usually this makes their boss, Benson (a gumball machine) extremely angry and on the verge to fire them and annoys their coworker, Skips (a yeti, voiced by Mark Hamill). The pair are always saved by the other manager/owner Pops (a man with a lollipop-shaped head) as he enjoys their constant antics. Co-workers Muscle-Man (an overweight, green man) and Hi-Five Ghost sometimes get involved in the shenanigans, but usually find a way out and leave Mordecai and Rigby in the firing line.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Clarence

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. When JP accidentally destroys a jersey of his, his father sends him a new one from Canada that is blue instead of orange - a couple of hockey kids take to his new look and recruit him into their group, but when he learns that the recruitment is permanent, Craig, Kelsey and Bobby must quickly learn to play on the ice in order to free JP from his obligation.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. With winter over and spring beginning, Kelsey befriends a girl named Sun Chun who owns a hamster named Cookie and runs a giant hamster tunnel all over the Creek - when Craig and JP discover that Cookie has been killed by a cat, Sun Chun becomes inconsolable. Taking Kelsey's words literally, Sun then steals 100 hamsters in an effort to ease her misery...

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Animated comedy following the adventures of Craig and his two friends Kelsey and JP as they explore the wilderness of the creek together. The Stump Kids discover an inflatable slide in the middle of the Creek, and when the 10 Speeds commend Craig for finding it, he turns it into a mini attraction for the other kids. However, when the ride becomes stale, Craig transforms a section of the Creek into an amusement park called Craig World and ignores his friends and an air leak on the slide...

programme.title: Goat Girl
programme.desc: Gigi, raised by mountain goats, attends boarding school at 13. Having had minimal human contact, this marks her first real exposure to society, prompting overseers Nanny and Billy to push her to spread her wings among people versus goats.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Cloris: When Clarence befriends an aging woman at the local retirement home, he's determined to remind her of her old self in order to convert the grumpy granny to his fun loving ways. / Fishing Trip: Mel learns that Chad has never taken Clarence fishing, a tradition he sees as a rite of passage, and decides to remedy this with a bonding trip for all the boys! Split into two groups, Mel and Clarence learn a bit about each other while Chad struggles with the ins and outs of fishing.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to get a game back from Tobias but Darwin starts to feel like a sidekick to Gumball and refuses to follow his orders. / Richard overhears Gumball and Darwin making fun of him which hurts his feelings and he has to regain his reputation as a hero. / Gumball tries to look good in the school photo. / Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of a trash can war between Richard and Mr. Robinson. / Gumball and Darwin cheat on their maths test get detention and have to escape. / Nicole gets upset with the family at the supermarket when her kids want chocolate but she says no. / The Wattersons must survive a bizarre game of Dodj or Daar through to the end. / Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball but his promise with Banana Joe interferes.

programme.desc: The Wattersons must survive a bizarre game of Dodj or Daar through to the end. / Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball but his promise with Banana Joe interferes. / Gumball and Darwin must apologise to everyone they know after getting a threatening message on Elmore Plus. / Gumball and Darwin try to understand Juke's urgent beatbox message. / Richard is left in charge for the day but his lack of rules attracts unwanted guests to the Watterson house. / Gumball and Darwin fail to make some instant homemade movie classics. / Gumball and Darwin's reputation is challenged and they really couldn't care less... / Gumball accidentally uploads a video of himself and wants it gone. / The Watterson kids come up with a fool-proof plan.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: Penny wants to ask Gumball to the Elmore Jr High Prom, but when Gumball's expectations for an extra romantic and extra complicated gesture become way more than Penny can handle, Penny must find a way to deliver.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

Quest
programme.desc: Take a chance to explore magnificent cities all around the world with the help of XP Guide with TravelXP. The hosts will walk you through the streets of cities in the four corners of the Earth, will introduce you to local cuisine, show you the night life, demonstrate modern and ancient architecture, provide the best shopping places. Even if you do not plan to visit this very city it will be absolutely entertaining and eye-opening experience. And if you get inspired by some particular place, do not forget to turn off TV before you go on the road.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: City Breaks is a travel show that guides you through most astonishing cities of the world to show their rich history and culture and inspires you to explore everything a city has to offer on a city break, its cuisine, shopping spots, wonderful views, historical values. From picturesque old towns to modern young cities, City breaks has it all- Munich, Budapest, Samarkand, Madrid, Dubai and much more. Take a rest and take a city break, you won't regret a single second.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.desc: Bliss on Travelxp shows you the best destinations across the globe. Take a wonderful trip to the beautiful beaches, enjoy vast landscapes, try amazing mouthwatering dishes. The host takes you around places to reveal their distinctive architecture, castles and gardens. Revel in a holiday of your dreams and discover the most luxurious hotels in Greece, Austria, India, Bulgaria, Turkey and much more.

programme.title: Best from the Rest
programme.desc: In our fast-moving world even on a holiday we are always short of time and in a rush. Best From the Rest on TravelXP will filter the information to save you every single minute so that you won't miss a thing. The show highlights top five places or activities that deserve your full attention in various cities all over the world. From top 5 romantic places in Mauritius, 5 best things to do when in Dubai, to 5 must see destinations in Hong Kong, 5 most sacred temples in the state of Rajasthan and 5 new adventures in Jordan. Every signature episode will take your breath away.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: As Milagros delves deeper into the heart of the Amazonas, her journey takes a thrilling turn.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Wonder the lengths of the globe learning all about the stories that made their homes in great kingdoms and unrivalled masterpieces, all from the comfort of your home with World Heritage. Whether its natural or man made, the interactions between the past and the present unlock a new angle from which we can observe these breathtaking sites and structures. Hosted by Travelxp, World Heritage aims to bring cutting edge travel content to travellers across the globe, bring the unseen and undiscovered into the forefront of the viewers' mind. When it comes to Travelxp its all about the journey, your journey.

programme.title: Xplore Spain
programme.desc: Documentary series. Join host Alexandra Outhwaite has she journeys through the wonderfully cultural country of Spain. The seventh most populous country in Europe, Spain is home to over 45 million people, and this series covers the country's three biggest cities: Madrid, Barcelona and Valencia. Alexandra dives into the local way of life to find out what makes Spain such an attractive prospect for tourists. With its pristine beaches, exquisite cuisine, stunning landscapes and festive fiestas, Spain is certainly one Europe's hottest destinations to explore.

programme.title: Off the Grid
programme.desc: This exciting series takes you to some of the most unusual places all around the world. Join the presenters as they visit remote destinations that are not the typical choices for tourists. Off the Grid shows you the hidden and often overlooked places with all their treasures. Discover them through their culture, history and way of living. Explore the food, traditions and customs and meet the people of wonderful countries like Gabon, India, Ethiopia, Ireland and more.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: Milagros's first stop to showcase her country is at Ica on Peru's southern coast known for its vineyards and for the desert oasis, Huacachina.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: For many years passion for travelling has been bringing people to unexplored continents, countries and places to look into culture, history, food, nature and people. This kind of passion if the key point of Backpack, a travel show that opens new spots all over the world by a show host travelling solo with a backpack. So make yourself comfortable and enjoy visiting Serbia, Spain, Israel, India, Egypt and many more. Take a look at the historical past and modern life, find out about traditions, get to know tourism hotspots and treasures of nature, plan your future vacations with the help of show hosts' recommendations.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Get a new direction and visit unfamiliar fascinating destinations all over the globe. programme.title: NHL. Montréal Canadiens - Tampa Bay Lightning
NHL. Montréal Canadiens - Tampa Bay Lightning
Major League Baseball. Red Sox - Yankees
National League. FR Gotteron - HC Davos
Jalgpall_ FA karikas. Southampton vs Arsenal
programme.desc: The FA Cup is the oldest knock-out tournament in England. Provided the Football Association, the competition provides raw emotion through "giant-killings" and 'underdog stories'. Premier League clubs enter in the third round of the tournament and with non-league teams starting the proceedings , n the early qualifying rounds, it promises to be another successful spectacle for viewers. In navigating to the latter stages of the knock-out rounds, teams all receive an amount of prize money that can be re-invested into training facilities and improvements to their respected grounds. With the final at Wembley, our exclusive coverage of this historic tournament will provide in-depth analysis and information. In keeping with the traditions of the trophy, Arsenal FC are the most successful (13).

programme.title: Jalgpall: Bundesliiga. VfB Stuttgart - Borussia Dortmund
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Prantsusmaa jalgpalli kõrgliiga 1. liiga. Pariisi jalgpalliklubi - Monaco
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Jalgpall: Hispaania LaLiga. Real Madrid - Girona
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: English Football League Championship
programme.desc: The English Football League Championship or the "EFL" as it is otherwise referred to, is the stepping stone from the wilderness of English football, to the riches associated with the promised land, that is the 'English Premier League'. In keeping with traditions of this club championship, we bring you first-hand, live coverage of developments for this division. Touted as one of the hardest leagues to manoeuvre out of, it was founded in 2004 and has truly delivered with its play-off system, offering a whole new dimension of entertainment, compared to other leagues out there. From "Sleeping Giants" such as Nottingham Forest & Sheffield Wednesday, to the jostling pack of Preston & Brentford, marquee match-ups every week will decide the final Championship standings, come the end of May.

programme.title: Glory Kickboxing. Donovan Wisse vs Chico Kwasi
Kolmeraudne
programme.desc: Mihkel Raua avakülalised on Kaia Kanepi ja tema treener Silver Karjus. Räägime Kaia teest maailma tippu. Jaanus Rahumägi selgitab, miks ta oma rikkust varjab. Üle kaheksa aasta taas romaani kirjutanud Kaur Kender räägib kirjutamisest, kirjandusest ja Eesti elu rollist selles kõiges. Muusikat teeb Nevesis.

programme.title: Kodu keset linna
programme.desc: Käsikiri: 2003–2010 Kerttu Rakke, 2010– Mihkel Ulman 2010– Livia Ulman 2010– Andris Feldmanis Peaosades Martin Veinmann, Kleer Maibaum, Indrek Ojari jt Kodumaise sarja keskmes on Tallinnas elav perekond: pereisa Hannes, tema naine Helen ning nende väike poeg. Elu hakkab probleemseks minema siis, kui nende ukse taha saabub Liis - Hannese tütar tema eelmisest abielust. Intriige punuvad ka naabrid, tuttavad ja sugulased.

programme.title: Kodu keset linna

programme.title: Kälimehed
programme.desc: Telelavastuse tegevus toimub ühe vaikse Eesti linnakese vaiksel kõrvaltänaval. Vaikelu saab aga rikutud, kui Urmase ja Riina kõrvalmajja kolib Riina õde Rebekka koos oma uue mehe Raivoga. Saatuse tahtel naabriteks ja kälimeesteks saanud Urmas ja Raivo on inimestena erinevad ning nende õdedest elukaaslased omavahel nagistanud lapsest saadik. Lavastuses näeme, kuidas üleaedsed peavad lahendama igale eestlasele nii tuttavaid probleeme naabrite läbikäimises ning mismoodi aitavad sellele kaasa õdede ellu sekkuv ema ning Raivo hämaravõitu äripartner Viks. Mängivad Peeter Oja, Sepo Seeman, Merle Palmiste, Hilje Murel, Ene Järvis, Andrus Vaarik, Jan Uuspõld, Ivo Eensalu jpt. Režissöör Rando Pettai, stsenarist Peep Pedmanson.

programme.title: Kättemaksukontor
programme.desc: Seekordses loos tuleb detektiivid rinda pista tõelise vandenõuteoreetikuga. Kättemaksukontori poole pöördub vandenõutereetiku abikaasa ja palub välja selgitada, millega ta mees tegeleb. Detektiivid korraldavad mehele salajase jälituse ja avastavad midagi väga häirivat.

programme.title: Padjaklubi
programme.desc: Kristina orgunnib Meelisega korteris uut deiti ja kõik peavad korraks kaduma, ühistu esimees ei tohi teada, et seal elab neli naist ja laps. Tüdrukud hakkavad aga Kristina rõhumise vastu streikima ja deit läheb totaalselt nässu. Meelis näeb, et ühistu reegleid on jämedalt rikutud. Laura suhe Christjaniga areneb edasi ja mees kutsub ta ootamatult uhkele ballile. Miša elu satub aga taksotöö tõttu suurde ohtu.

programme.title: Üheotsapilet
programme.desc: Kas klaas on pooleldi täis või pooleldi tühi? Britta vastaks, et tühi. Ta ei hooli endast ega oma elust. Kuid ometi väärib ka Britta armastust ja selle ta leiab, kõige ootamatumal moel. Täna on Britta elu 11 045. päev. Tal on pilet. Üheotsapilet.

programme.title: Õun ei kuku
programme.desc: Delaneyd näivad pealtnäha kadestamisväärselt õnneliku perena. Endised tennisetreenerid Joy ja Stan on nelja täiskasvanud lapse vanemad. Kuid kui Joy ootamatult kaob, on lapsed sunnitud oma vanemate abielu ja perekonna minevikku uue, hirmunud pilguga üle vaatama.

programme.title: Kodu korda
programme.desc: Tim läheb oma saatega merejalaväe baasi, aga tal on piinlik, kui Jill osutub tanki juhtimisel võimekamaks.

programme.title: Kodu keset linna
programme.desc: Käsikiri: 2003–2010 Kerttu Rakke, 2010– Mihkel Ulman 2010– Livia Ulman 2010– Andris Feldmanis Peaosades Martin Veinmann, Kleer Maibaum, Indrek Ojari jt Kodumaise sarja keskmes on Tallinnas elav perekond: pereisa Hannes, tema naine Helen ning nende väike poeg. Elu hakkab probleemseks minema siis, kui nende ukse taha saabub Liis - Hannese tütar tema eelmisest abielust. Intriige punuvad ka naabrid, tuttavad ja sugulased.

programme.title: Pöörased
programme.desc: Lane'i maailm variseb kokku pärast seda, kui ta tabatakse Doni allkirja võltsimise eest. Sally nädalavahetus Draperitega möödub ebamugavalt.

programme.title: Padjaklubi
programme.desc: Laura kohtub ilusalongis rikka naisega, kes mängib kummalist mängu, ta laenab Laurale balliks kleidi. Tüdrukud päästavad Mišat ja Laura peab ballilt nagu tuhkatriinu ära jooksma. Illimaril on aga USAst tulles suured kohanemisraskused, ta ei tea enam, mida tegema peaks. Meelis teeb Kristinale huvitava ettepaneku ja Gabriel ei taha endiselt lahutust anda. Kristina on nüüd meeste turmtule all. Miša on aga läbielatud ehmatuse tõttu masenduses.

programme.title: Kullakesed
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche, Rose ja Sophia on neli eakat vanadaami. Nende kõigi suurimaks ühiseks jooneks on nende abikaasad - kõik on kas surnud või lahutand. Neli vanamemme otsustavad kokku kolida, et vanaduspõlve hõlpsamaks ning huvitavamaks teha.Kuid samas pole mitte ühelgi neist kadunud ammune janu meeste järgi. Igaüks üritab endale pidevalt kaaslast leida ning vahest ka teiselt üle trumbata.

programme.title: Üheotsapilet
programme.desc: Vaadates noort inimest, võib tunda ainult rõõmu, et tal on elu alles ees ja kõik uksed valla. Eriti, kui tegemist on andeka inimesega. Klaudia on väga andekas. Lisaks noor ja abielus hea mehega. Kuid kas uks, mis tema ees avaneb, viib ikka tulevikku? Täna on Klaudia elu 9576. päev. Tal on pilet. Üheotsapilet.

programme.title: Kättemaksukontor
programme.desc: Kuigi vandenõuteoreetik näib olevat täielik hull, on nüüd detektiivid kindlad, et keegi kasutab teda ära ja juhib teda nagu hüpiknukku. Uurijad ja detektiivid üritavad meeleheitlikult leida vandenõuteoreetiku niiditõmbajaid.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylani ema Iris naaseb Los Angelesse, mis taaselustab vanad perekondlikud vaenulikkused. Brandon jätkab hasartmängude mängimist. David ja Steve kohtuvad Icon Recordsi omaniku Curtis Brayga. Brenda on masendunud.

programme.title: Salatoimikud
programme.desc: Mulder näeb unes nägemust oma lapsepõlvest, kus tema vanemate elus on toimunud suur tagöödia. Ärgates on ta käed ja särk verised. Selgub, et Mulderi relvaga on tapetud kaks inimest, kuid mees ise ei ta sellest midagi.

programme.title: Pöörased
programme.desc: Partnerid kaaluvad kontoripinna laiendamist. Don hakkab kummitusi nägema. Peteri afäär saab pettumust valmistava lõpu. Megani ema kohtub Rogeriga.

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Rühmaga liitub uus vetelpäästja ning see tekitab töötajate hulgas erinevaid tundeid. Jill ja Shauni hakkavad võileibade müümisega äri tegema, kuid avastavad, et konkurents on karmim, kui nad arvata oskasid.

programme.title: Kälimehed
programme.desc: Telelavastuse tegevus toimub ühe vaikse Eesti linnakese vaiksel kõrvaltänaval. Vaikelu saab aga rikutud, kui Urmase ja Riina kõrvalmajja kolib Riina õde Rebekka koos oma uue mehe Raivoga. Saatuse tahtel naabriteks ja kälimeesteks saanud Urmas ja Raivo on inimestena erinevad ning nende õdedest elukaaslased omavahel nagistanud lapsest saadik. Lavastuses näeme, kuidas üleaedsed peavad lahendama igale eestlasele nii tuttavaid probleeme naabrite läbikäimises ning mismoodi aitavad sellele kaasa õdede ellu sekkuv ema ning Raivo hämaravõitu äripartner Viks. Mängivad Peeter Oja, Sepo Seeman, Merle Palmiste, Hilje Murel, Ene Järvis, Andrus Vaarik, Jan Uuspõld, Ivo Eensalu jpt. Režissöör Rando Pettai, stsenarist Peep Pedmanson.

programme.title: Kired
programme.desc: Sarja peategelasteks on kaks abielupaari, kelle suhted muudab keeruliseks ühe paari naise ja teise paari mehe vahel puhkenud kirg. 1998. aastal TV3 eetris jooksma hakanud seriaali stsenaariumi autorid olid Aita Kivi, Juhan Habicht ja Stella K. Wadowsky, toimetaja Tiina Lokk, näitejuht Rein Oja, režissöörid Toomas Kirss ja Kalev Lepik. Peaosadesmängisid Merle Palmiste, Marika Vernik, Ita Ever, Märt Visnapuu ja Ivo Uukkivi. Produtsent oli Toomas Kirss.

programme.desc: Vestlussaates Kolmeraudne on Mihkel Raua tuttavas raudses haardes nädala kuumemad tegelased tipp-poliitikutest kultuurikorüfeedeni, lisaks esineb igas saates üks ansambel.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Saladuslikud inglid teevad ime, peatades bussi ja veoauto kokkupõrke. Dylan hakkab ebasoodsas olukorras olevatele lastele jõuluvana mängima.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Steve kohtub Joega, kes viib tema ja Brandoni välja. Brenda ja Kelly lähevad kahe Princetoni õpilasega kohtingule. Donna ja David satuvad konkurentsi.

programme.title: Palume lavale
programme.desc: Koomikute trio Jan Uuspõld, Tiit Sukk ja Kadri Adamson võtavad mõõtu improvisatsioonilistes ülesannetes ühe Eesti teatri kolmikuga. Neid aitavad ka meie tuntud lauljad. Saatejuht on Raivo E. Tamm.

programme.title: Doktor Silva
programme.desc: Pereõde Estril on kõrini, et teda peetakse mõrvarist vanatüdrukuks ja ta otsustab vägisi koos mehega elama hakata. Ta hakkab ühte eluheidikut endale meheks kodustama ja õelad kuulujutud näivadki vaibuvat, kuid varsti selgub, et kogu teema tekitab hoopis uusi pingeid. Silva tahab perearstikeskust peresõbralikumaks muuta ja mõtleb välja uue moodsa teenuse. Blond Annika otsustab aga viimaks pritsumehega koos elama hakata.

programme.title: Eesti parim pagar
programme.desc: Saate "Eesti parim pagar" viiendas episoodis on osalejate read jäänud hõredamaks ning pinge suurem kui varem. Sel korral ei piisa vaid heast maitsest, vaid osalejatelt oodatakse pärmitainast inseneritöid. Keerulisi punutisi ja mustreid - tõelisi meistriteoseid! Saate tehniline ülesanne on aga tõeliselt rabav üllatus. Kuidas osalejad end sellest välja keerutavad, näeb juba saatest.

programme.title: Joel Ostrati suur õhtusöök
programme.desc: Eesti muusika karika võitnud menubändi Shanoni kitarrist ja laulja Taavi Immato ei pea end talle omasel tagasihoidlikul moel kuigi vilunud kokaks. Ometi suudab ta oma kodus Joeli üllatada erakordselt viimistletud roogadega, mis isegi kõike näinud meisterkoka pahviks löövad. Milliste nippidega teeb Joel need road Eesti suurimas tanklarestoranis Tikupoiss toimuvaks suureks õhtusöögiks veelgi ägedamaks?

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Ranna lähedal avatakse uus hotell ja samal ajal pannakse toime mitu mõrva. Craig arvab, et need kaks asja on omavahel seotud. Eddie käitub oma unenägude tõttu Craigi naise seltsis närviliselt. Shauni saab teada, et teda imetletakse rannas.

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Ühes Los Angelese rannas tegutseb vetelpäästjate rühm, mida juhib Mitch Buchannon. Nad päästavad elusid, maadlevad eraeluliste muredega, võitlevad kuritegevuse vastu ja löövad kaasa uskumatutes seiklustes.

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Mitch läheb keskkooli kokkutulekule ja kohtub endise klassikaaslasega, kes äratab temas vanu tundeid. Eddie tunneb end halvasti, kuna tal pole autot. Ta ostab sõbralt väga odava masina, aga saab siis aru, miks hind nii soodne oli.

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Rannas toimub rannavolleturniir ning Trevor tahab, et Jill oleks tema partner. Nende peamine rivaal on Jilli endine partner ning Jill on nõus selle tõttu osalema. Toimub näitus kohaliku kai päästmiseks, aga Shauni ja Eddie satuvad selle tõttu raskesse olukorda, kui kai kokku variseb ja nende soomusauto vee alla vajub

programme.title: Rannavalve
programme.desc: Rühmaga liitub uus vetelpäästja ning see tekitab töötajate hulgas erinevaid tundeid. Jill ja Shauni hakkavad võileibade müümisega äri tegema, kuid avastavad, et konkurents on karmim, kui nad arvata oskasid.

programme.title: Brigaad 3
programme.desc: Õnnetusjuhtumi tulemusena kukub väike poiss kaevu ja kuna kiirabibrigaad ei suuda ülesse leida õiget tänavat, on poisi elu tõsises ohus. Dr. Toomas on tõeliselt pettunud oma brigaadi autojuhis ja paneb peaarsti dilemma ette, kas tema või autojuht peavad kiirabist lahkuma.

programme.title: Varjudemaa
programme.desc: Tallinnas edukalt karjääri teinud Rita peab naasma Saaremaale, kus ootamatult suri tema isa. Rita ei ole 20 aastat kodukülas käinud. Teda ootavad seal umbusklikud kohalikud, tumedad minevikuvarjud ja jahmatav tõdemus, et isa surm võis olla mõrv. Rita otsustab asja uurima hakata ja see seab ta silmitsi seni tundmatu pettuse, vägivalla ja hirmuga.

programme.title: Šaakali päev
programme.desc: "Šaakal" on tabamatu palgamõrvar, kes teenib elatist kõrgeima tasu eest mõrvu toime pannes. Peagi kohtab ta endale väärilist vastast – visa Briti luureohvitseri, kes jälitab teda põnevas kassi-hiire mängus üle kogu Euroopa. Osa tegevusest leiab aset ka Tallinnas, tuues esile Eesti pealinna rahvusvahelises spioonimängus. Kõrvalosades ka Eesti näitlejad: Tambet Tuisk ja Jane Napp, Johan Elm, Saamuel Pilpak ja Mirtel Pohla.

programme.title: Narcos: Mehhiko
programme.desc: Andrea avastab jahmatava seose, mis vallandab sündmuste kaskaadi. Walt jõuab Alexi abiga Benjaminile lähemale. Hank ähvardab Amadot.

programme.title: Muumia
programme.desc: Aastal 1719 e.Kr. langes võimas ülempreester Imhotep (Arnold Vosloo) needuse alla: temast saab elav surnu, kelle piinad saavad olema igavesed. Ta maetakse Surnute linna, kus hauakambri sügavuses tema õel süda pimeduses sajanditega üha tugevamaks muutub. 3000 aasta möödudes, 1923. aastal komistab Võõrleegioni ridades võitlev Rick O'Connell (Brendan Fraser) Hamunaptra peidetud varemetele. Hiljem vanglas vedeledes avastab Rick, et see võib päästa ta võllast. Varsti ongi seikleja koos arheoloog Evelyni (Rachel Weisz) ja selle hädavaresest venna Jonathaniga (John Hannah) teel Sahara kõrbe, et viia nad Hamunaptra muinasjutuliste aareteni. Seda tehes avavad nad aga Imhotepi hauakambri ning iidne needus pääseb valla, tugevamana kui kunagi varem.

programme.title: Kired
programme.desc: Sarja peategelasteks on kaks abielupaari, kelle suhted muudab keeruliseks ühe paari naise ja teise paari mehe vahel puhkenud kirg. 1998. aastal TV3 eetris jooksma hakanud seriaali stsenaariumi autorid olid Aita Kivi, Juhan Habicht ja Stella K. Wadowsky, toimetaja Tiina Lokk, näitejuht Rein Oja, režissöörid Toomas Kirss ja Kalev Lepik. Peaosadesmängisid Merle Palmiste, Marika Vernik, Ita Ever, Märt Visnapuu ja Ivo Uukkivi. Produtsent oli Toomas Kirss.

programme.title: Täna õhtul...
programme.desc: Virve Köster on loonud üle mitmesaja laulu õnnest ja õnnetusest, merest ja aastaaegadest, kindlasti ka armastusest. Kõike seda saadab alati Virve huumor. Laulumemme naljasoone paneb proovile ja kuulab tema lugusid saatejuht Vahur Kersna.
